programme.title: Lockup: Cincinnati: Extended Stay

programme.title: Lockup: Cincinnati: Extended Stay
programme.desc: A jailhouse assault leads to one bloody inmate, and two sides to the story; another inmate makes a daring escape; one of the jail's most violent inmates decides it's time for a change.

programme.title: Lockup: Indiana: Extended Stay

programme.title: Lockup: Indiana: Extended Stay
programme.desc: From the most trusted inmates, working at the prison barbershop, to inmate assaults on prison staff, or inmates who turn violence against themselves, at Indiana State Prison, "cutting" has many meanings.

programme.title: Lockup: San Antonio: Extended Stay
programme.desc: In San Antonio, Texas, rival gangs shed blood in a power struggle to control a wide range of criminal activity including drugs, prostitution and human trafficking; this turf war has expanded from the streets to inside the walls of Bexar County Jail.

programme.title: Lockup: San Antonio: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Gang members disrupt a housing unit, and when inmates flood their cells, the Special Emergency Response Team, or SERT, takes action, placing one inmate in special restraints; a female inmate poses a dangerous threat to staff.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: An outlandish con artist poses as a Saudi royal to cheat investors out of millions by promising them access to Arabian oil stock; from his penthouse on Fisher Island, phony sultan Khalid Bin Al-Saud lures victims with dreams of untold riches.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: Carlos Rafael makes millions as the owner of one of the largest commercial fishing businesses on the East Coast, but his big mouth gets him hooked in an undercover IRS sting with agents posing as Russian mobsters.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: Daylon Pierce is a consummate ladies' man who claims to be a licensed stockbroker, wooing unsuspecting women through internet dating sites; after the women hand over millions of dollars, Pierce robs them blind and breaks their hearts.

programme.title: Lockup: Tulsa: Extended Stay

programme.title: Lockup: Tulsa: Extended Stay
programme.desc: One inmate's troubled past leads to angry outbursts inside the jail, while another arrives after an alleged crime spree that sounds like it's right out of a movie; a young mother could go to prison if she's found guilty of robbery.

programme.title: Lockup: Tulsa: Extended Stay

programme.title: Lockup: Sacramento: Extended Stay

programme.title: Lockup: Charleston: Extended Stay

programme.title: Lockup: Charleston: Extended Stay

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs tiene que dejar a un lado sus sentimientos personales y trabajar con Trent Kort, quien regresa para rastrear a un criminal peligroso.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Abby tiene que asumir una misión secreta del gobierno cuando su científico desaparece, pero pronto se da cuenta de que las cosas podrían no ser lo que parecen.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo se dirige a Los Ángeles para colaborar con el equipo local en la investigación de un asesinato, que pronto se convierte en algo mucho más grande. Mientras tanto, Tony empieza a investigar la vida privada de Ziva.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): El Mustang Bullitt
programme.desc: Danny y Báez investigan el robo del famoso coche que se conducía en una película clásica, ahora propiedad de Owen Cairo (Anthony Edwards).

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Héroes olvidados
programme.desc: Cuando Danny y su familia son amenazados por Thomas Wilder (Louis Cancelmi), un asesino en serie que Danny no ha podido detener, la preocupación de Linda se intensifica por el trabajo de su marido y por el estado de su matrimonio.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Resistencia
programme.desc: Erin retoma un caso de homicidio estancado y, con la ayuda de Anthony Abetemarco, busca un testigo clave que había desaparecido.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Las banderas de nuestros padres
programme.desc: Danny es interrogado por el investigador del fiscal de distrito cuando su expareja es acusada de colocar pruebas para cerrar un caso de homicidio.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando una familia de cuatro miembros es secuestrada durante unas vacaciones en Barbados, la UAC es convocada para asistir al jefe de la unidad Jack Garrett (Gary Sinise) y a su unidad internacional en su investigación.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando una familia de Maryland aparece asesinada en la mesa de su comedor, el equipo localiza a otros familiares y amigos para descubrir secretos de su pasado, esperando averiguar que puedo haberlo llevado a ello y encontrar al responsable.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando tres personas implicadas en asesinatos, afirman que fueron atacadas por un “monstruo sombrío con garras” en el momento en que ocurrió cada crimen. La UAC busca a un sospechoso que controla sus mentes.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando aparecen víctimas de disparos en el área de Los Ángeles en una posible relación con actividades criminales, la UAC busca a un justiciero sospechoso.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo se dirige a Los Ángeles para colaborar con el equipo local en la investigación de un asesinato, que pronto se convierte en algo mucho más grande. Mientras tanto, Tony empieza a investigar la vida privada de Ziva.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: En Los Ángeles, Gibbs y McGee siguen colaborando con la división del NCIS para rastrear a un grupo terrorista.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando asesinan a un agente de ICE tras una brecha de seguridad en la casa del Secretario de la Marina, el equipo del NCIS tiene que colaborar con el FBI y el ICE para resolver el caso.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A biker with a history of stealing vehicles doesn’t know how to drive his motorcycle. A man in- between jobs takes up a sketchy method of earning money. Deputies strongly question the legitimacy of a man’s work van.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A dangerous high-speed pursuit quickly comes to a head after the driver loses control. In Florida a man is pulled over in a stolen vehicle and asserts the car belongs to his parents. Arrests are made in a Florida prostitute sting.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A dangerous pursuit between Officers and a known meth dealer ends in an arrest. A suspect with several felony warrants is apprehended without incident. A pursuit involving a stolen motorcycle exceeds speeds of 100mph.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police investigate suspicious activity in a known drug area, officers encounter a jaywalker with the munchies, and a woman caught with meth wants points for honesty.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Carjacking victims flag down officers whom then locate, pursue and acquire the stolen vehicle, and a man admits to officers the car he's driving is stolen.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A sibling reluctantly called authorities when his belligerent brother refused to leave his mother's home. Officers respond to a shoplifting call at a local grocery store. Officers investigate a suspicious vehicle parked at a local gas station.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Two suspects hit a car with their U-Haul truck. A suspect flees on foot after a car pursuit. An elderly man is selling fake jewelry.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A seatbelt violation ends in a chase to the confusion of all involved. A suspect with a history of grand theft auto is found in another stolen car. Officers find drugs in a tough part of town.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man suspected of shoplifting attempts to ditch his clothes, and officers respond to a dispute between a shopkeeper and a man suspected of paying with counterfeit money.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A female assailant attacks a woman after merely bumping into her. A woman is arrested for spilling beer on an unsuspecting cameraman’s expensive equipment. Two intoxicated women are placed under arrest after a physical altercation.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An arrest is made in a notorious New Jersey drug hotbed. Officers find a suspect hidden under a mattress. A bicycle thief is caught red handed.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A chase ends when one of the police units successfully performs a pit maneuver which eventually disables the vehicle. An officer responds to a domestic dispute between a mother and her son. Officers attempt to pull over a vehicle with expired tags.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A wild-eyed man leads police on a chase that ends in a Tasing, officers respond to an in-progress lovers' spat, and a traffic stop results in drug and auto theft charges.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man runs from police over a parole violation. Officers respond when a trouble maker is expelled from a bar for bad behavior. Police pursue a man after he bails from his car during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A handcuffed passenger surprises Officers by running from a traffic stop. A fleeing SUV runs out of gas shortly after a pursuit is terminated. A man claims guns were planted in his car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A first-time offender brings officers on an intense car chase, deputies respond to an armed robbery, and a routine traffic stop ends in multiple arrests.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers wrestle with a familiar nuisance to shop owners, a man's lucky dollar lets him down during a traffic stop, and too much whiskey leads to a domestic disturbance call.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police pursue a driver who ran a stop sign. A suspect wearing a D.A.R.E. T-shirt is found to be in possession of drugs. A woman claims the drugs found in the vehicle she’s sleeping in are not hers.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect questions whether Officers are 'the real police'. A fleeing suspect parks at an elementary school and makes excuses. A husband's 'final answer' sends his wife to jail for meth.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man refusing to comply gets tased, recent texts on a suspect's phone paint a different story from what he's told officers, and a woman tries to hide evidence from police.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Prostitute sting operations prove successful for undercover officers in both Wichita, KS and Palm Beach, FL. Officers inform an unsuspecting John that the individual offering up services is likely not who he thinks they are.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers engage in a highspeed pursuit of a stolen vehicle. Police contact the Fire Department and alert the guests when they spot a motel fire. Officers pursue a suspect on a stolen motorcycle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A seasoned corporal gives some advice to a young man with a new motorcycle. A woman’s impatience lands her in hot water when she’s pulled over for tailgating. Officers give a driver multiple chances to come clean to no avail.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A traffic stop takes a surprising turn when a suspect creates a spur-of-the-moment diversion, and a soft-spoken driver has difficulty being upfront with the officers.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer on street patrol chases down a suspect on foot, an alleged car thief posts his exploits on Facebook, and a crashed stolen car may not have been stolen after all.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and Nick investigate the death of a book restorer, while Catherine and Sara are called to the scene of a fatal train crash.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and Catherine investigate the apparent violent death of a woman found in a sandbox. Their investigation leads them to the underground world of s and m clubs.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team investigate a casino heist during which innocent victims were shot, while Catherine and Sara are called to the scene of a murder in a remote part of the desert.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Warrick is in charge for the first time as the team investigates the murder of the con artist, who has run off with some tourists' money only to get shot and killed in the parking lot. The prime suspect in the case turns out to be Captain Brass' daughter.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team is called in when a famous real estate entrepreneur is found dead in a hotel elevator.

programme.title: CSI

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom's nemesis, serial killer Paul Millander, reappears and claims a third victim in this gripping episode.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine is ordered by a kidnapper to accompany a man who is to deliver $1 million in ransom to him or else he will kill the man's mistress.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom investigates the murder of a Las Vegas photographer whose remains were dumped at a nearby body farm.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Catherine and Sara are called in to investigate when a hockey player dies during a practice. Warrick and Nick look into the apparent drug-related death of a sax player at a casino.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom investigates the murders of four monks who were shot point-blank while chanting in a Buddhist temple.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A bus carrying 23 passengers from Los Angeles to Las Vegas crashes less than 40 miles from its destination, killing nine people.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Jane Galloway is a nervous breakdown waiting to happen. She has completely shielded herself from the outside world, but that doesn't stop a stalker in her attic from killing her.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and Catherine investigate the stabbing death of an 80-year-old woman who lived in a run-down house full of cats.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Grissom y Warrick toman el caso de un joven que es descubierto desnudo en el desierto sin una causa obvia de muerte.

programme.title: CSI en español

programme.title: CSI en español

programme.title: CSI en español

programme.title: Caso Cerrado

programme.title: Gigoló americano

programme.title: El diario de Bridget Jones

programme.title: Bridget Jones: Al borde de la razón

programme.title: El bebé de Bridget Jones
programme.desc: Regresa Bridget Jones inesperadamente embarazada y sin saber la identidad del padre del bebé. Los ganadores del Óscar Renée Zellweger y Colin Firth se unen a Patrick Dempsey en el siguiente capítulo de la vida divertida y sorpresiva de Bridget.

programme.title: El vuelo
programme.desc: Un piloto logra evitar que un vuelo se estrelle, pero la investigación del fallo revela algo inquietante.

programme.title: El lobo de Wall Street
programme.desc: Sexo. Dinero. Poder. Drogas. Prepárate a disfrutar de una historia del legendario cineasta Martin Scorsese. Leonardo DiCaprio interpreta a un corredor de bolsa en búsqueda de una vida llena de emociones, donde reina la corrupción y no hay límites.

programme.title: El vuelo
programme.desc: Un piloto logra evitar que un vuelo se estrelle, pero la investigación del fallo revela algo inquietante.

programme.title: El matador
programme.desc: Un asesino a sueldo que recorre el mundo entabla una inesperada amistad con un vendedor tras encontrarse en un bar de hotel en la Ciudad de México.

programme.title: Atrápame si puedes
programme.desc: Dirigida por Steven Spielberg y protagonizada por Leonardo DiCaprio y Tom Hanks, narra la historia real de Frank Abagnale Jr., quien antes de los 19 años estafó millones haciéndose pasar por piloto, médico y fiscal.

programme.title: Bumblebee (ESP)
programme.desc: Bumblebee, un robot herido y destrozado, es encontrado y reparado por una adolescente llamada Charlie. Ambos deberán unir fuerzas para salvar el planeta de los malvados Decepticons en esta aventura llena de acción para toda la familia.

programme.title: La estafa maestra
programme.desc: Tras ser traicionados y abandonados a su suerte en Italia, Charlie Croker y su equipo planean un elaborado robo de oro contra su antiguo aliado.

programme.title: Peligro en la montaña
programme.desc: Jason Momoa protagoniza este intenso thriller de acción sobre un leñador que lucha por sobrevivir contra los traficantes de drogas que han escondido heroína en su cabaña de caza.

programme.title: El gran rescate
programme.desc: En medio de la Segunda Guerra Mundial, el Batallón nro. 6 de exploradores recibe una misión de proporciones heroicas: ir 50 kilómetros tras las líneas enemigas y liberar a más de 500 prisioneros de guerra estadounidenses.

programme.title: Rambo: Primera Sangre
programme.desc: El veterano de la guerra de Vietnam, John J. Rambo, vaga a una pequeña ciudad de Washington en busca de su viejo amigo, pero se encuentra con la intolerancia y brutalidad del aguacil, Will Teasle.

programme.title: Rambo II: la misión
programme.desc: John Rambo is enviado a una misión al sureste de Asia para rastrear a unos prisioneros de guerra, pero termina enfrentando a soldados vietnamitas que resguardan los campos.

programme.title: Rambo III
programme.desc: Rambo se rehúsa a unirse a su amigo y antiguo mentor, el coronel Trautman en una misión en Afganistán. La misión falla y Trautman es capturado por tropas rusas. Ahora Rambo debe infiltrarse a la fortaleza rusa y salvar a su único amigo.

programme.title: Indiana Jones y el reino de la calavera de cristal
programme.desc: En «Indiana Jones y el reino de la calavera de cristal», Indy (Harrison Ford) intenta adelantarse a una brillante y bella agente (Cate Blanchett) en la búsqueda de la mística y todopoderosa calavera de cristal de Akator.

programme.title: Indiana Jones y el templo de la perdicion
programme.desc: En este éxito de taquilla, Indiana Jones debe rescatar a unos niños desaparecidos que han sido secuestrados por terroristas religiosos en Oriente y que, casualmente, están en posesión de unas joyas sagradas robadas.

programme.title: La máquina del tiempo
programme.desc: Con la esperanza de alterar los acontecimientos del pasado, un inventor del siglo XIX viaja 800 000 años hacia el futuro, donde encuentra a la humanidad dividida en dos razas beligerantes.

programme.title: Hotel para perros
programme.desc: Un adolescente huérfano que aloja en secreto a perros perdidos en un hotel abandonado. Basado en la novela de Lois Duncan.

programme.title: Indiana Jones y el templo de la perdicion
programme.desc: En este éxito de taquilla, Indiana Jones debe rescatar a unos niños desaparecidos que han sido secuestrados por terroristas religiosos en Oriente y que, casualmente, están en posesión de unas joyas sagradas robadas.

programme.title: Indiana Jones y la ultima cruzada
programme.desc: No hay nada más emocionante que intentar seguir el ritmo de los Jones en «Indiana Jones y la última cruzada». Los enemigos nazis de Indy han vuelto y han secuestrado a su padre, en su intento por localizar el sagrado Santo Grial.

programme.title: El periodista, la leyenda de Ron Burgundy
programme.desc: En el mundo de los noticieros de los setenta, Ron Burgundy y su equipo son los líderes en San Diego. Todo marcha muy bien para los chicos hasta que la reportera estrella, Veronica Corningstone, llega para cambiar las cosas

programme.title: La lista de pendientes
programme.desc: Brandy, una excelente estudiante de preparatoria, desea estar bien "educada" antes de la universidad, por lo que arma una lista con las actividades sexuales que no ha podido practicar. Para esta tarea, Brandy le pide ayuda a su hermana y a su jefe.

programme.title: Bandidos
programme.desc: ¡Prepárate para una comedia de acción de lo más divertida con Bruce Willis, Billy Bob Thornton y Cate Blanchett! Joe (Willis) y Terry (Thornton), dos convictos, arman un plan para robar un banco… hasta que se topan con una ama de casa bastante excéntrica.

programme.title: Un detective suelto en Hollywood
programme.desc: Las papas queman en esta comedia-acción de ritmo veloz, con la actuación estelar de Eddie Murphy como Axel Foley, un listo policía de las calles de Detroit, que rastrea al asesino de su mejor amigo en Beverly Hills.

programme.title: Un detective suelto en Hollywood II
programme.desc: Axel Foley regresa a Beverly Hills para ayudar a Taggart y Rosewood a investigar el tiroteo casi mortal del jefe Bogomil y la serie de "crímenes del alfabeto" asociados a él. Protagonizada por Eddie Murphy.

programme.title: Un detective suelto en Hollywood III
programme.desc: Axel Foley (Eddie Murphy), que investiga una red de robo de coches, se encuentra con algo mucho más grande que eso: los mismos hombres que mataron a su jefe llevan una red de blanqueo de dinero en un parque temático de Los Ángeles.

programme.title: El Infierno
programme.desc: Benny es deportado de Estados Unidos a un México desgarrado por la guerra entre cárteles del narcotráfico. Se involucra en el negocio narco y asciende rápidamente, rodeado de dinero, mujeres, violencia y excesos.

programme.title: Pídeme lo que quieras
programme.desc: Tras la muerte de su padre, Eric Zimmerman viaja a España para supervisar las sucursales de su empresa. En Madrid, se enamora de Judith y entabla una relación erótica llena de exploración. Eric teme que su secreto acabe con su aventura.

programme.title: Qué pena tu vida
programme.desc: Un hombre inseguro y con el corazón roto, trata de recuperar a su último amor con la ayuda de su amigo fiel, tomando un camino de malas decisiones que lo llevan a comprenderse a sí mismo y a los demás.

programme.title: Todo incluido
programme.desc: Una familia sin pretenciones en vacaciones encuentra lo inesperado cuando un huracán los obliga a estar encerrados y se revelan secretos impactantes.

programme.title: Purasangre
programme.desc: Purasangre narra la historia de cómo un equipo de cinco profesionales se ve obligado a robar un famoso hipódromo y casino.

programme.title: Amor a primera visa
programme.desc: Alejandro, un mariachi, y su mejor amigo, Canicas, aprovechan un encuentro casual como una oportunidad para hacer cambiar de opinión a la joven de la embajada, Rachel, que rechazó la solicitud de visa de su hija para visitar EE. UU.

programme.title: Terror en Amityville
programme.desc: En noviembre de 1974, una familia de seis miembros fue víctima de un brutal asesinato. Un año después, una pareja joven e inocente, George y Kathy Lutz, y sus hijos se mudan a una casa en la que ocurrió un terrible incidente.

programme.title: Wishmaster: el genio del mal
programme.desc: Cuando un apreciador de joyas recibe una gema antigua, sin saberlo, desata un espíritu inmortal que concede deseos a los humanos a cambio de sus almas.

programme.title: Avenida Cloverfield 10
programme.desc: Después de un accidente de autos, una mujer despierta en el búnker de un supervivencialista. Él afirma haberla salvado de un ataque apocalíptico, pero al sospechar de sus intenciones, ella deberá escapar para descubrir la verdad.

programme.title: Operación Overlord
programme.desc: Nada puede prepararte para el caos alucinante de Operación Overlord. El mega productor J.J. Abrams crea un emocionante viaje retorcido sobre un equipo de tropas estadounidenses que se encuentran cara a cara con los súper soldados nazis nunca vistos.

programme.title: Sueño satánico
programme.desc: ¡Un niño se dedica a contar las historias... para distraer a una bruja del presente que quiere meterlo en el horno!

programme.title: Pet (LAS)
programme.desc: A man bumps into an old crush and holds her captive underneath the animal shelter where he works.

programme.title: Guerra mundial Z
programme.desc: Guerra Mundial Z es una acelerada epopeya de lo que podrían ser los últimos días de la raza humana. El ex colaborador de la ONU Gerry Lane (Brad Pitt) es llamado para ayudar a acabar con la caótica pandemia que se extiende por el mundo.

programme.title: Hour Of The Gun
programme.desc: Director John Sturges presents a reworking of the Wyatt Earp/Doc Holliday legend and the struggle for political control of Tombstone, with a marvelous trio of antagonists: James Garner as Earp, Jason Robards as Holliday, and Robert Ryan as Clanton.

programme.title: Run For Cover
programme.desc: Ex-criminal in the old days of the West teaches a woman the ways of love and a boy the art of courage.

programme.title: Stardust on the Sage
programme.desc: When a radio commentator fakes Gene Autry's voice on her show telling cattlemen to invest their money in a hydraulic mining venture rather than in cattle, Gene must correct the error of her ways.

programme.title: Call Of The Canyon
programme.desc: Gene Autry leads cattlemen in rebellion when a packing company rep cheats them. A gal’s future depends on the company's radio spots for her show! It gets exciting when the owner appears incognito.

programme.title: Bells Of Capistrano
programme.desc: A feud between rodeo companies accelerates when both want Gene Autry, as a crowd-drawing added attraction. This film features Gene singing five hits, including "In Old Capistrano" and "Forgive Me."

programme.title: The Return Of A Man Called Horse
programme.desc: Richard Harris stars in this superior sequel which follows the plight of a horribly wronged tribe of Sioux Indians and the white man who would join in their revenge.

programme.title: One-Eyed Jacks
programme.desc: After robbing a Mexican bank, Dad Longworth takes the loot and leaves his partner Rio to be captured but Rio escapes and searches for Dad in California.

programme.title: Detective Story
programme.desc: Kirk Douglas stars as the rigid detective whose personal code has become twisted from dealing with too many criminals. Eleanor Parker is his wife, tormented by a guilty secret.

programme.title: Ace in the Hole
programme.desc: A cave collapse traps a man, and all eyes turn toward the tragedy, including those of Charles "Chuck" Tatum (Kirk Douglas), a washed-up newspaper reporter who sees the incident as a ticket back to his former days at the top of the journalism heap.

programme.title: The Vikings
programme.desc: Legends Kirk Douglas, Tony Curtis, Ernest Borgnine and Janet Leigh dazzle in this epic chronicle of brutal rivalry and bloodthirsty ambition as two brothers are locked in a battle that will decide their fate...and that of a beautiful princess.

programme.title: Blithe Spirit
programme.desc: A man and his second wife are haunted by the ghost of his first wife.

programme.title: City Lights
programme.desc: With the aid of a wealthy erratic tippler, a dewy-eyed tramp who has fallen in love with a sightless flower girl accumulates money to be able to help her medically.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Two divorced men decide to share a New York apartment. Fussy Felix, fastidious to a fault. He proves that cleanliness is next to insanity. And Oscar, who wreaks havoc on a tidy room with the speed and thoroughness of a tornado.

programme.title: Barefoot In The Park
programme.desc: Robert Redford is Mister Straight. Jane Fonda is his new wife. As the ecstasy of the honeymoon gives way to the reality of setting up housekeeping in a five-flight walk-up, the harmony of marriage turns to comical discord.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: After receiving a tax refund from the IRS, Oliver inspires his fellow citizens to make similar requests. There's only one problem... those making requests haven't paid their taxes! Nevertheless, the IRS mistakenly sends out half a million dollars!

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver is insistent that he and Lisa have a romantic Sunday afternoon picnic, all alone. His romantic gesture for two turns into a picnic for the entire town. Finally, Oliver finds them a romantic refuge in a most unlikely place.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: When Eb places an ad in a magazine claiming to be a wealthy landowner, it catches the eye of a young socialite. When the young woman makes an unexpected visit to Hooterville, Eb is forced to keep up his ruse.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver and Lisa play host to four children from the city, who find themselves in Hooterville as part of a rural exposure program. The kids learn how to milk the cow, pick vegetables, plant seeds, and share sleeping quarters with four-legged friends.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Eb feels the time is right to settle down and marry Darlene. However, he has nowhere near the money it will take to make a down payment on a house. With the help of the Douglases, who have given him two acres of land, Eb applies for a loan.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Lisa and Oliver try to sort out of the troubles of fools in love. The problems begin when Eb invites both his girlfriend and another young woman to the same dance, while Arnold the pig falls for not one, but two attractive bovines.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Lisa tells a rather fanciful version of how she met and fell in love with Oliver. The Douglases' house guest, little Lori Baker from the city, is all ears. The tale begins with how Lisa's father, the king, was exiled, causing Lisa to flee to Paris.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: The family is getting ready to celebrate Mike's good fortune, he's been published. It happens just at the wrong moment because Archie has just been laid off due to the recall of a government contract.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie continues to have problems with finances and with finding another job. At the grocery store, he stresses himself about Edith's spending habits and tries to save money even if it means denting cans to save two cents.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie's pain turns into something more serious as he has to have his gallbladder removed and he is taken to the hospital right away for the operation.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie goes into the hospital and has a verbal run-in with a Puerto Rican nurse and gets a blood transfusion from a black doctor.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Mrs. Naugatuck is ready to become an American citizen -- but her test turns from mental to physical when she learns she has a serious illness. The Findlay's frustration over her forgetfulness changes to concern when she is admitted to the hospital.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude's unfailing loyalty to her nephew Steve stretches very thin, and so does Walter's patience, when it becomes evident that his 'free and easy' lifestyle is just a cover-up for his basic lack of responsibility.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude refuses to accept the idea that a noted literary authority would choose to lunch with Vivian at the exclusion of herself. But, when she confronts the two of them, the reality of the situation becomes painfully clear.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Carol discovers she's got to show her boss more than just proficiency if she wants a promotion -- and Maude, upset, tries to save Carol from sacrificing herself.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude has nothing but good intentions when she hires an ex-convict, but panics after she finds out why he went to prison.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Can one innocent kiss ruin two marriages? It looks that way when Maude and Arthur catch their spouses in an illicit embrace.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: John and his new wife, Suzanne, reach a crisis point in their marriage when one of them must drop out of college due to financial woes.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: A Christmas party at the garage is interrupted when Louie, the dispatcher teams up with Alex in a game of high-stakes poker against his cardshark brother Nick.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The taxi gang scrambles to come up with a scheme aimed at ending a one-sided romance when a determined, pretty cabbie sets her cap for Tony and joins the Sunshine Cab Co. to be near him.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Alex feels sympathy for a fare who’s a real loser with the women and arranges a date for the man with Elaine, who later discovers that her klutzy companion for the evening is a U.S. Congressman.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: To understand each other better, Felix and Oscar reverse their roles -- Felix turning to a slob and Oscar becoming a fussbudget.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Felix gets Oscar in trouble with the Internal Revenue Service.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: To raise funds for his financially troubled amateur opera club, Felix induces Oscar to arrange for a gambling event.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Felix and Oscar are arrested and charged with ticket scalping.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: A nurse attends to more than Robbie's broken leg.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: A broken marriage gives Mike and Sally a lot to think about.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Morphine tablets have been disappearing from Newton General Hospital, and Tibbs' investigation into the suspicious deaths of terminally ill patients at that facility leads him to believe his Aunt Ruda's own physician, Dr. Lambert, might be involved.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Bubba learns the disappointing truth that Eddie Larran, the country singer he idolizes, might have stolen his biggest hit, leaving his former writing partner, Ace McCabe, with none of the wealth derived from the song. Robert Goulet guest stars.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Serena Grimes, the victim of a violent armed robbery, becomes obsessed with Bubba Skinner when she misinterprets his kindness for romance. Soon, flowers arrive at the station for Bubba, amusing Gillespie and the staff, until the stalking begins.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: When a publisher who blackmailed them is found murdered, San Francisco's social elite are suspects.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A dead cop's partner conceals the fact that the death resulted from his own mishandling of his job.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: When a high-ranking hoodlum's son is found murdered he brings in the help of the androgynously named "Sydney"—a hit woman who's assigned to murder the three thugs responsible.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A meticulous and ruthless assassin and former government agent is hired by a rightwing cabal to murder a visiting Chinese diplomat.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Keller infiltrates a group of Vietnam War protesters, hoping to find who murdered an AWOL marine.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix travels to northern California, where he's been hired by the sister of a young man who disputes the cause of her brother's death.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix finds a woman stabbed to death, witnesses that won't come forward, and evidence that a teenage ex-con friend of Peggy's, may be the killer.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: The wife of a wealthy jet-setter is accused of murdering a philandering playboy on her husband's yacht, and the wealthy man hires Joe Mannix to investigate the crime, hoping he will turn up evidence to exculpate his wife.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: The head of an electronics firm arrives home to find his wife drowned at the bottom of their pool, just as one of his rising young associates flees the scene.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Three otherwise ordinary guys who carpool together plan a $335,000 heist, but when things go horribly wrong and it turns into a case of murder, Barnaby Jones gets involved.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: An ambitious young man working his way through law school (Jim Wayburn) who works for a bail bondswoman (Roxie Morgan), who just happens to be a friend of Barnaby, is tricked into securing the release on bond of a convict (Ross Kemper) in exchange

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Amanda's cousin falls to his death when his motorcycle suddenly veers off the road. Amanda leads the investigation when it's discovered her cousin was drugged immediately before the accident.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan investigates a free health clinic after several homeless people turn up dead... with missing organs.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan tries to solve a friend's murder while Steve investigates the deceased's ex-wife and her identical twin sister.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A visiting surgeon must deal with his alcoholism after a fellow doctor is murdered during one of his blackouts.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: When a photoshop erroneously sends Dr. Sloan the wrong set of photographs, he becomes embroiled in the murder investigation of an escort girl. Meanwhile, Amanda's baby is about to come to term.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall investigate the mysterious death of Allegra, Hunter's former girlfriend.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: When Hunter (FRED DRYER) investigates a drug ring, his ex-partner, Frank Garriman (JAMES McEACHIN), becomes a suspect in the murder of the dealers.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: Lawrence Tierney guest stars as Detective Doyle, who comes out of retirement to help Hunter and McCall investigate the murder of actress-turned-prostitute Elizabeth Short.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: In an episode reminiscent of Hitchcock's Strangers on a Train, Dr. Sloan is drawn into a murder pact by a psychiatrist in need of money. The psychiatrist kills a woman pestering Dr. Sloan, expecting Mark to eliminate his problem.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Jesse is attracted to a beautiful psychic, who also happens to be the prime suspect in a murder. Amanda copes with the trials of motherhood.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: The daughter of one of Mark's friends writes a juicy tell-all expose of the most prominent public figures. Mark takes her in after a crazed stalker starts threatening her and her co-authors.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: The daughter of a wealthy Texas businessman is kidnapped by a Japanese gang. The ransom request is for the businessman to turn over his security chief who had been a cop in Japan and was responsible for capturing many of the gang members.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: The leaders of a money-laundering operation at a bingo hall are captured and put on trial. The accountant is asked to testify against her bosses. Walker and Trivette have to take her to court, but she keeps escaping them for her own agenda.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Alex gets Walker and Trivette assigned to a movie being filmed as technical advisers. While on the set, Walker overhears several stuntmen talking about a train robbery they are planning.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Naomi gets an obscene phone call and doesn't tell the family until the guy calls again. The family unsuccessfully tries to figure out why this guy is after Naomi, blaming her in the process. The family later apologizes.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Ellen has met an attractive, younger man named Glen, but doesn't want Mama to meet him because of the age difference. After the family learns Glen is Ellen's new boyfriend, Mama freaks out.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Al convinces Jefferson to bet on a football game, but the star of the football team starts dating Kelly, and it interrupts his training.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Al and Jefferson become vintage shoe entrepreneurs.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Al must brave the department of motor vehicles to renew his driver's license, but discovers that his fate lies in Bud's hands.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: An untimely pimple threatens Kelly's acting career.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Bud is distracted by Marcy's sexy niece.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Al refuses to allow breastfeeding in the shoe store.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Al's high school football field will be destroyed for an auto shop, so he protests. Meanwhile, Kelly tests a new bug spray on Bud and Buck, which has unwanted effects.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Al is offered $50,000 dollars to reveal the identity of Jefferson, who is revealed to be a spy.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Robbie falls in love and plans to get married after college. But when they have to babysit a friend's child on short notice, they realize that they are far too young to be married.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: When a female student joins the boys' track team and proves that she's faster than anyone, Chip decides to join the girls' field hockey team in protest.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Chip and his friend annoy Robbie and his date, who turns out to be the older sister of Chip's friend. Robbie decides to get back at Chip on his next date.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Robbie thinks he can handle dating two women at one time. Everything is going fine until the two women have a chance meeting.

programme.desc: Mr. Wilson is convinced that he is allergic to Dennis because he sneezes every time Dennis is around.

programme.title: Dennis the Menace
programme.desc: Mrs. Wilson knits several baby booties to use as covers for a new set of golf clubs, and Dennis quickly spreads word around the neighborhood.

programme.title: Dennis the Menace
programme.desc: Mr. Wilson wins an essay contest that requires the entrants to be parents, so he tries to pass off Dennis and his friends as his own children.

programme.title: Dennis the Menace
programme.desc: Dennis and Tommy decide to use pigeons in the park to send messages to each other.

programme.desc: Because Bud violates a traffic law, he must do community service as a crossing guard.

programme.desc: Bud becomes a town hero after preventing a bank robbery.

programme.desc: Betty finishes first in a track race in addition to becoming the flower queen.

programme.desc: Kathy is nervous about the school spelling bee, so Betty give her a penny and convinces her that it has special powers.

programme.title: Family Affair

programme.desc: Jody talks about having a job with a man who builds buildings and even gets paid for it. Uncle Bill thinks he is making it up. Bill later meets the man and realizes it is the person he has been trying to meet for a construction project.

programme.desc: Cissy's school is having a mother/daughter dinner. This makes Cissy miss her mother more.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: After U.S. Navy sailor disappears in 68, the Navy claims he went AWOL. But his sister works for over 30 years to prove that he was really killed. And DNA from a cigarette butt helps detectives to unravel a 20-year-old case of rape and murder.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: On a summer night in 1987, a 17-year-old girl to come home is found raped and strangled near the Hudson River. And In 1983, a young mother is raped and murdered at work. The crime remains unsolved for two decades.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: While hiking with husband Dennis in Montana, Leslee Larson fell into Wolf Creek. Then Dennis is convicted of murdering his wife, while in Main. And 15-year-old papergirl Penny Parker goes missing, then her body is found by a search volunteer.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: A videotape made at an ATM machine helps police in Louisville, KY, to nab a man suspected of raping 13 women. And a DA investigator in Georgia helps crack a murder case that his father, a police chief, first worked on 30 years before.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: In 1979 Janie Landers disappears from a home for the impaired--the latest consequence of the facility's history of neglect. When Janie's body is found, there are many suspects but it is years before the killer is found.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: Police solve a murder when divers find a skeleton in a car at the bottom of a river, and a dead dog's DNA helps crack open a 6-year-old case.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: Work of an Alberta, Canada detective finally pays off when he tracks down the man who murdered a 6-year-old girl 10 years earlier. And when police search for the killer of a hitchhiker, they find that the victim's diary is one of their best clues.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: The longest-running cold case of a law enforcement officer in the United States was the murder of Sheriff's Lt. Joe Clark.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: On February 2, 2010, two masked gunmen commit a violent robbery and shoot Michael Temple Jr., rendering him a quadriplegic for five years before his death. In this unusual cold case, DNA is used to create a sketch of the killer.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: A police investigator discovers a letter written 16 years earlier that provides clues to a woman's murder. And a firearms expert supplies the evidence that South Carolina authorities need to put a man on trial in 2002 for a murder committed in 1961.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: A mother is suspected in the murders of two of her daughters when her third daughter finally convinces police to reopen two cold cases.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: With access to the San Francisco Police Department's work, including saliva samples taken from letters the infamous Zodiac Killer sent 30 years ago, we reevaluate the case of the serial killer who began terrorizing California in the late 1960s.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: In a city of eight million, landlord Bruce Blackwood disappears without a trace in March 2006. Though there is no body, the NYPD is sure this is a homicide and they spend the next nine years searching for answers.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: When a 30-year-old mother fails to report for duty in Virginia, the Army lists her as AWOL. Her family immediately suspects foul play. They embark on a 13-year quest for answers before an eyewitness blows the case wide open.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: South Park's first film festival attracts crowds of pretentious, tofu-eating movie lovers to the quiet mountain town.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: The kids' parents only have their best interests at heart when they arrange for Stan, Kyle and Cartman to be exposed to the chickenpox virus.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Carl Sagan and Ann Druyan fall in love, Wernher von Braun becomes the father of American rocket science, and Russian cosmonauts perform the first spacewalk. Chelsea Peretti, Paul Scheer, Adam Devine, Blake Anderson and Nathan Fillion guest star.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: LSD pioneer Timothy Leary escapes from prison, a sailor travels to Devil's Island to perform a daring rescue, and a baker's whiskey habit keeps him calm aboard the Titanic. Featuring Thomas Middleditch, Chris Parnell, Tom Lennon and Ron Funches.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Sam Patch becomes America's first daredevil, Marilyn Monroe and Ella Fitzgerald form a lasting friendship, and Buster Keaton takes his talents to the big screen. Featuring Kyle Mooney, Tony Hale, Billie Joe Armstrong, Juno Temple and Gabourey Sidibe.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Carry A. Nation vandalizes bars, Andrew Jackson gets involved in a shootout, and Marsha P. Johnson stands up for LGBT rights. Featuring Vanessa Bayer, Michael Cera, Mariah Wilson, Alexandra Grey, Dwight Yoakam, Brendan Sexton III and Trace Lysette.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Teddy Roosevelt revolutionizes football, Winston Churchill pays FDR a visit at Christmastime, and Eleanor Roosevelt befriends a female Soviet sniper. Featuring Rob Riggle, Mae Whitman, Busy Phillips, Rich Fulcher and Louie Anderson.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Charles Ponzi hires a publicist to improve his image, Sadie the Goat becomes a notorious Hudson River pirate, and a conman poses as a Scottish royal. Featuring Jesse Plemons, Kat Dennings, Ed Helms, Taran Killam, Josh Charles and Ronda Rousey.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: As Lawndale High prepares for the annual teachers versus classic rock DJs hockey game, Daria and Quinn must miss the festivities since they're both been grounded.

programme.title: Daria

programme.desc: Entre 1985 y 1988, 18 personas fueron asfixiadas, abusadas sexualmente y dadas por muertas en las remotas montañas de California.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Susie Mowbray fue acusada de la muerte de su esposo. Su hijo estaba tan convencido de su inocencia que se matriculó en la facultad de derecho, estudió todas las pruebas y, finalmente, descubrió la verdad de lo que realmente sucedió entre sus padres.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un barco camaronero de dos hombres se hundió cuando una violenta tormenta de rápido movimiento azotó la costa de Luisiana. El capitán se ahogó y el marinero fue rescatado catorce horas después.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una joven pareja decidió celebrar su primer aniversario de bodas con un viaje de campamento a Mount Hood.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer desaparece sin dejar rastro. A pesar de que se sospecha de un juego sucio, las pistas no funcionan y la investigación se estanca.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los residentes de Noel, Missouri, se sorprendieron al enterarse de que su banco había sido asaltado y el presidente del banco había desaparecido.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La noticia del brutal asesinato de una azafata hizo que el hijo de una víctima que había sido asesinada cinco años antes se pusiera en contacto con la policía.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1998, una actuación de asesinato misterioso en Maryland se convierte en una verdadera novela policíaca cuando se descubre el cuerpo gravemente quemado de Stephen Hricko en su habitación de hotel.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El cuerpo de Leanne Tiernan, de 16 años, fue descubierto nueve meses después de su desaparición. Los científicos forenses encontraron pistas que pintaron un retrato virtual de su asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Parece que una mujer ha perdido el control de su camioneta SUV y ha caído en el barranco de un arroyo profundo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una joven mujer asiste a los servicios religiosos de la tarde y luego desaparece. Cuando se encuentra su automóvil abandonado, el tanque está vacío y falta una lata de gasolina que tenía en su baúl para emergencias.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Mientras estaba practicando tiros en un hermoso día de primavera, Martin Dillon es asesinado con disparos. Su amigo sostiene que fue un extraño accidente, pero se necesitan más de 20 años para que la verdad salga a la luz.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1980, Shannon Mohr, residente de Michigan, murió en lo que su nuevo esposo, David Davis, reportó que fue un accidente al montar a caballo. Después de su muerte, la familia de Shannon informó que Davis parecía estar lejos de estar agobiado por el dolor.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el estreno de la serie Archivos Forenses (Forensic Files), la serie de crímenes reales más extensa de la historia, una asistente de vuelo de Connecticut desaparece. La policía sospecha que su esposo es culpable de asesinato, pero ¿pueden comprobarlo?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Rompecabezas de plástico
programme.desc: Un hombre que iba en bicicleta resultó herido de muerte y la policía creía que había sido víctima de un accidente de atropello y fuga.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de dispararle a sus víctimas en la cabeza, el asesino limpió la escena, colocó la evidencia incriminatoria en una bolsa de plástico y la arrojó al río.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Apenas unas semanas antes de que una testigo testifique contra el hombre acusado de agredirla sexualmente, ella es asesinada en el patio delantero de su propia casa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La mujer estaba muerta. Al hombre le habían disparado cuatro veces pero sobrevivió.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The DCC take the field for the first time in their signature DCC boots. Learning the DCC entrance proves very challenging for some, while others struggle to get accustomed to dancing in cowboy boots. Melissa Rycroft is featured.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The recruits do media training with NBC 5 Dallas-Fort Worth lead news anchors Meredith Land, Kelli, and Judy name two triangle points, and guest judge Melissa Rycroft sits in.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The ladies put their modeling skills to the test on photoshoot day, Julia tries to bounce back after her car accident, and the dancers get a lesson in healthy cooking.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With one week until the start of the season, Kelli and Judy make a tough cut, the show group performs for the first time, and Charlotte Jones Anderson judges rehearsal.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: To make their final cut, Kelli and her team try to find one hopeful of the remaining 37 who isn't ready to perform at the Cowboys' home opener.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: After an unusual online audition process, the rookie candidates for the 2020 squad move into an isolated training camp bubble amid the ongoing COVID-19 pandemic.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The 20 rookies try to master a socially distanced version of the famous kick line and some intricate choreography, and Kelli helps the ladies get fitted for uniforms.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Guest choreographers test the rookies with new routines, the veterans arrive at camp determined to earn back their spots, and country star Mickey Guyton has inspiring words for the hopefuls.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The pressure's on for rookies and vets as the hopefuls head to the stadium for their first field rehearsal, and Kelli and Judy must decide which women won't move on in training camp.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The rookies outshine the veterans when choreographer Travis Wall teaches a sexy dance number, and Kelli and Judy give some of the vets a wake-up call.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The dancers get a chance to showcase their unique talents during show group auditions, and Kelli and Judy deliberate with guest judges to select the elite squad.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The dancers test their ability to think on their toes during a series of mock-press interviews, and as auditions wind down, a shocking bit of news shakes up the process for Kelli and Judy.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli and Judy make cuts via video chat after a positive test for COVID-19 halts camp, Charlotte Jones hands out the iconic uniforms, and the team performs its game-day entrance.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: As 51 rookies and veterans arrive to chase their dreams, the candidates hope to prove their talent with a standout solo performance and take on the kick line in the Judges' Showcase.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Dial M For Mystery Pimp Caller?
programme.desc: Flavor Flav is looking for a woman with the “Total Package.” And now, with only eight women left in his house, he has devised the “Total Package Challenge” to judge who offers the most.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Halitosis Ohmyosis
programme.desc: Flav challenges the final six girls to a calendar shoot showing off the bodies of the year.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: A Night At The Hip Hopera
programme.desc: With the latest twist still fresh and furious on the Flavorettes' minds, two new alliances quickly form in the house.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: Flav is so smitten with the remaining nine girls that he's going to marry them!

programme.title: Flavor of Love: The Neverwed Game
programme.desc: The remaining seven girls are in for a big surprise when they find themselves on the set of the first ever “Neverwed Game” starring Arsenio Hall as the host and their own ex-boyfriends!

programme.title: Flavor of Love: When Flavorettes Attack
programme.desc: Flav bring his five remaining girls to "Big Boy's Neighborhood" on LA's biggest Hip Hop Radio Station to have live callers help him decide which girl is right for him.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Its A Family Flav Fair
programme.desc: With only four women left vying for Flav's affection the moment of truth has arrived, meeting the parents.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Von Boyage
programme.desc: After the last elimination, Flav tells his final three girls to pack their bags because they are heading to Cannes, France!

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Clip Show
programme.desc: Episode 14 is a clip show with never before seen footage.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Parlez Vous Flavor
programme.desc: After a season of ups and downs and a dramatic twist of plans in Cannes, it's down to Flav's final girls.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Reunion After The Lovin
programme.desc: On the reunion episode, Flav and 20 girls talk about what happened on the show and what is going on in the lives right now.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Back to the Rocking Horse
programme.desc: Twenty more beautiful babes vie for his love and affection. Some bare more than their souls in an attempt to grab Bret's attention.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Peep Show
programme.desc: In the first ever Peep Show Contest, the girls all compete for a date with Bret by showing off their greatest “talents.”

programme.title: Rock of Love: Stroller Derby
programme.desc: But things turn ugly when the most hated girl in the house gets alone time with Bret – the fangs come out and the girls are out for blood!

programme.desc: It’s Frankie’s birthday, and she’s going to celebrate it, Hollingsworth style -- with a Gatsby party!

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Zoe is facing jail time following the fundraising scandal

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Becky has feelings for Jonah, but she isn't sure what to do with them.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Maya has someone on her mind, and is questioning the house rules Mrs. Matlin has set.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Prom is fast approaching, but Clare is MIA from committee meetings.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Zig is hesitant to let Maya see his new place.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Zig learns the truth behind some recent events, and now he’s an accomplice to a crime.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Vince has taken Zig in and treated him like family, but his actions have put Zig, and now even Maya, in harm’s way.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s prom time at Degrassi and in a last-minute shot to save his night, Drew plans an elaborate prom-posal.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Drew agrees to help Dallas salvage Prom and is punished.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Maya fails her CPR and now she can’t spend the summer lifeguarding at the beach with Zig.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Everyone’s spooked by Gloria’s disappearance as strange things continue to happen.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Determined to get to the bottom of Mr. Bane’s creepy info trove, Zoe and Grace break into his car only to discover more incriminating evidence.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Zoe attempts to ward off her feelings for an unlikely candidate by leaning into a romance a familiar face.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After months of flirting via e-mail, thirteen-year-old Emma's new love interest, Jordan, is going to be in town. Coincidentally (fatefully?), it's the same night as her mother's high school reunion.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After months of flirting via e-mail, thirteen year-old Emma's new love interest, Jordan, is going to be in town. Coincidentally (fatefully?), it's the same night as her mother's high school reunion.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ashley has set her sights on becoming Degrassi's School President. Toby, spurred on by their awkward new situation as step-siblings, is frustrated by her unchallenged status and convinces JT to run against her.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Terri's sure that no guy will ever want her and she wants to skip the school dance. Spinner seems interested in her though, and Ashley and Paige convince her to let them make her over.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Toby can't stand the idea of Parents Night - the last time his divorced parents were in the same room they had a huge, embarrassing fight.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ashley and Jimmy's eight-month anniversary is coming up - and so is the question of whether or not to have sex. Paige is playing Juliet opposite Jimmy's English-class Romeo and she's planting doubts in Ashley's mind.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jimmy desperately wants to make the basketball team. But, surprisingly, it looks like Sean is surpassing him as a possible star player.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After a long absence overseas, Ashley's dad is back in town. She's enjoying his company and attention, but something tells her there's a piece of his life that's being kept from her.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Lacking real family time at home, Jimmy has been spending more and more time at Ashley's house. He and Toby are like brothers and Kate's begun referring to him as her "third kid".

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Recently diagnosed with a learning disorder, an embarrassed Liberty is ashamed to tell her friends about her tutoring sessions. Emma sees one of Liberty's private sessions and, putting two-and-two together with Liberty's suspicious behaviour, asks J.T.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Sean asks Emma what she's doing tonight, Emma's thrilled - that's a date, right? But nervous Sean is unable to muster the courage to arrange the details and Emma misunderstands his hesitancy as rejection.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Paige decides to start a Spirit Squad at Degrassi, Emma can't believe that the "sexist" sport of cheerleading is being revived. But Manny, who's had years of gymnastics training and is desperate for something to help make her "cool"

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ashley's convinced that she and Terri are going to be the stars of the school talent show, singing her new (and incredibly earnest) ballad. Terri would rather add Paige -- and some fun sparkle -- to the act, but she's not sure how to tell Ashley that.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Rick decides to get back at his bullies, hitting them right where it hurts – their cars. But when Jimmy becomes a member of the “Whack Your Brain” team, the two form a truce.
